item.description:

item.title: AdamSchefter: Adam Schefter @AdamSchefter · 18min Miami running back De'Von Achane, who was not present for the start of the team’s vo
item.description: Adam Schefter @AdamSchefter · 18min Miami running back De'Von Achane, who was not present for the start of the team’s voluntary off-season workout program last week, was spotted in the Dolphins’ training facility today, per sources. It is believed that Achane showed up as a sign of good faith as the two sides Mostrar más 93 165 858 121 mil

item.title: Schultz_Report: Jordan Schultz @Schultz_Report · 21min The #Cardinals at #3 remain the biggest mystery for teams in the top five if they
item.description:
Jordan Schultz @Schultz_Report · 21min The #Cardinals at #3 remain the biggest mystery for teams in the top five if they stay put, but the belief is a trade down is very much in play, similar to how Arizona operated in 2023 when they moved back from that same #3 spot, per multiple league sources.
Arizona added an Mostrar más 26 48 239 34 mil

item.title: RichCimini: Rich Cimini @RichCimini · 25min The great Curtis Martin is slated to announce the #Jets second-round picks in Pittsburgh
item.description: Rich Cimini @RichCimini · 25min The great Curtis Martin is slated to announce the #Jets second-round picks in Pittsburgh, where he was raised and attended Pitt. 6 32 158 5 mil
